rationale: Career is entirely in marketing/project management at TCS and fictional Dunder Mifflin with no ML, IR, or engineering production work — skills list shows Flask/Tailwind with no embeddings, retrieval, or ranking experience.

Built recommendation-style production ML features at Yellow.ai and Sarvam AI (product companies), but skills are skewed toward TensorFlow/diffusion/forecasting with no explicit embeddings, vector search, hybrid retrieval, or ranking evaluation (NDCG/MAP) experience.

Entire career at IT-services firms (Infosys and TCS) doing data pipelines and analytics engineering with only lightweight sklearn/XGBoost work — no production IR, embeddings, or ranking system experience, and explicitly wants to transition into ML rather than already being there.

Backend/mobile engineer with 5.7 years primarily in web/fullstack at Swiggy and Capgemini, with only a self-learner RAG side project and no production ML, embeddings, or retrieval work — semantic search listed as an intermediate skill but no substantive career evidence supports it.

Pure sales and marketing career at Infosys and fictional Initech with 3.4 years of experience — zero technical or ML engineering work, and the skills listed (CI/CD, Kafka, Redis) are beginner-level with no credible deployment context.

Only 2.5 years of experience as a .NET Developer at fictional Stark Industries and Wipro (IT services), with QA automation and Android mobile background — self-learner AI level with no production ML or IR work.

Despite a Ph.D in CS from VIT, the entire 6.9-year career consists of marketing management, graphic design, and project management at Wipro and fictional Pied Piper — no engineering or ML production work whatsoever.

10.2-year career entirely in sales, customer support, and accounting at Wipro, Hooli, and fictional Pied Piper — no technical or ML engineering background, with only casual ChatGPT experimentation mentioned and skills confined to Go/FastAPI/ETL at beginner-intermediate level.

8.7 years across customer support, accountant, mechanical engineer, and HR manager roles at fictional companies (Stark Industries, Initech) — zero ML or software engineering production experience despite recently taking online RAG and vector database courses.

8.6-year career as graphic designer, civil engineer, business analyst, and sales executive at Hooli, Infosys, and non-tech firms — civil engineering degree from Amity, ASR listed as an advanced skill but no NLP/IR engineering career evidence exists.
